title: astraea paulina
intro: Astraea paulina, also known as Star of the Andes or Purple Coneflower, is a flowering plant species native to South America. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. Astraea paulina is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, colds, and respiratory problems, as well as protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its health benefits and medicinal properties.
